transformation.name: bcb-sgs-ingestion
transformation.description: fetches the most recent observation of a declared BCB SGS series and normalizes it into a canonical unit (RFC-0020 v0.1)
transformation.source_tradition: official statistical source (Banco Central do Brasil, SGS)
